prefabs.name: SLF12_PREFAB_01_WallGaslightCage
prefabs.notes: Wall-backed caged gaslight with layered brass frame, warm glass core, blackened iron guard rods, rivets, pipe feed, and soot halo card.

prefabs.name: SLF12_PREFAB_02_HangingLantern
prefabs.notes: Ceiling-hung brass lantern with chain links, canopy, glass barrel, cage rings, guard rods, caps, steam vent collar, and soot shading.

prefabs.name: SLF12_PREFAB_03_VerticalInspectionLamp
prefabs.notes: Tall wall inspection lamp with amber tube glass, riveted iron rails, brass wall plate, copper feed pipe, grime cards, and service fasteners.

prefabs.name: SLF12_PREFAB_04_PressureGaugeLampMount
prefabs.notes: Combined gauge and lamp bracket with readable pressure dial, needle, ticks, lamp capsule, pipe yoke, rivets, and soot bloom.

prefabs.name: SLF12_PREFAB_05_PipeBracketGlowGlass
prefabs.notes: Horizontal pipe bracket with glowing inset glass, brass clamp collars, blackened iron pipe, wet reflective streaks, rivets, and porcelain insulators.

prefabs.name: SLF12_PREFAB_06_BrassSwitchBox
prefabs.notes: Riveted brass wall switch box with lever, red enamel lockout slot, porcelain terminals, pilot glass, cable glands, soot, and oil staining.

prefabs.name: SLF12_PREFAB_07_SootHaloDecalPlane
prefabs.notes: Transparent soot and grime decal plane for lamp smoke halos behind fixtures.

prefabs.name: SLF12_PREFAB_08_FixtureFamilyLineup
prefabs.notes: Palette prefab collecting the seven core Set12 fixture assets for quick isolated review.
